title: Waste of money
body: I have been using this product for over a month now and haven't noticed any improvement. Don't waste your money.

title: Reaction
body: I used this a couple of times and started feeling bumps on my scalp that were itchy. I’ve never been allergic to any hair product before this. I returned not worth it.

title: Greaseball
body: I wanted to like this but it left my scalp greasy.

title: You need this
body: I use the kerastase genesis serum and I got this a sample and then immediately bought it. It’s so good. I feel like I noticed the difference the next day even tho I know I didn’t. It’s very good. It’s less watery than others. You need this
The 1oz size bottle was only half full upon arrival. the serum is non greasey, lightweight. After using a whole bottle (over about 1 month) I didn't see any positive effects.

I couldn’t really give this the best review because I only used it once. This serum is a liquid and not an oil. I wished that was mentioned in the description. As a person that straightens their hair I can’t use this every day so I’ll have to return this

title: Magic in a bottle ￼
body: Best stuff ever!!!!! My hair was completely destroyed by a lot of bleach and a bad haircut this stuff saved it!!! my hair looks better than it did even before I got ruined￼. Buy it! Buy it! Buy it!

title: Celiac hair loss
body: I’m not always one to write a review, but this stuff really works!! Even my hair dresser has noticed a huge improvement in the thickness of my hair. I was losing my hair like crazyyy and finally grew it out past my shoulders with this stuff. Life changing!!!

title: DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY
body: I have replenished this so many times, I have genuinely seen a huge difference in hair regrowth and new growth!

title: Try it!
body: I went to the store looking for the kerastase oil but they were out so she said this one was a good alternative. NO IT IS NOT. Made my hair greasy every time I used it even on freshly cleaned hair. Didn’t see ANY improvements with my hair at all and I used it consistently. I used the whole bottle before judging
This stuff makes my hair suuuuper greasy really fast :/
Since I started using this, I have noticed new baby fine hair at my temples. It seems to be working.

title: Great for stress-induced hair loss
body: The serum actually works really well if you have stress-induced thinning/shedding. I was dealing with lots of stress at work and my hair became “skeleton like” and when I would brush it or even just touch it, strands of broken hair would be caught in my fingers. I started using this serum in December (the before photo) and these are the results now (mid-June). I know there’s different causes of hair loss but the ashwagandha (which is known to lower cortisol levels) is really helpful in this serum when it comes to stress related. My routine is basically Biotin supplements, derma-rolling my scalp (x2 a week) and then applying this serum.

title: Allergic reaction.
body: I used the serum and vitamins for a month and the last week I began to have severe irritation on my scalp (mainly on the left area where I would apply the serum), the eyebrow beneath that area, and the eyelash line of my left eye. Also had a week long headache. Definitely pay attention to all the ingredients used. I'm not severely allergic to anything normally asides from walnuts. But this felt like a sunburn in all the areas mentioned. Went to the doctor and they agreed it was an allergic reaction. The prescribed a pain killer, Benadryl, and an eye ointment. Lots of stories on Reddit I wish I would have looked up prior to purchasing.

title: Postpartum hair loss struggling mom!!!!
body: I am not really the type to write reviews, but this product warrants one. This is my second time going through full blown post partum hair loss, and my results are drastically different ever since adding this product to my routine. My hair is noticeably thicker, fuller, and falling out lesss. Give it two months to officially work. This is a miracle product.

title: I like it!
body: For those who want to use their points on this, dont. Only a few uses of product (0.17 ounce bottle) waste of points, save or get something better.

Quickly noticing a difference! I’ve used tons of products to help my thinning hair and this is working. Product doesn’t leave hair greasy or sticky, can be used a couple days in a row without needing to wash hair.
I used this product for about 1.5 months. I’m not sure how much thicker it made my hair, but my highlights have never grown out so quickly. Maybe double? I do think it’s very over priced.

title: Very Disappointed
body: I started using this after several months of using Monat Clinical for thinning hair. Monat worked wonders, but it was SO expensive. I thought I would try this. In short order, I not only lost all the progress I made with Monat, but my hair is even thinner. Bad hair fall. Plus, it made my scalp itchy. I can't go back to Monat because of cost but will be trying something other than Nutrafol now. So disappointed.

title: Pay attention to the ounces on bottle
body: It didn’t leave my hair greasy but also did not give me any results after finishing a whole bottle. Very meh.

title: NOT A PAID REVIEW
body: I didn’t pay attention at the how many ounces were in this bottle at the time of purchase, as you would assume it comes full like any other product. There is only 1 oz of serum in the bottle and the instructions say for you to use it to the scalp everyday. I am only 2 weeks into my bottle and the entire thing is almost empty, in the next week it will be gone. This bottle is $50. I would be having to order a new one monthly along with the supplements and honestly for the average person this just is not affordable. I suggest looking for a different growth serum as there are tons on the market.

title: Nutrafol Serum not worth it
body: Hair type: Fine. Hair goal: Thickening w/o weighing down. I applied to clean scalp at my hair line (wet hair) then after 15 minutes I dried my hair. I was very pleasantly surprised the next morning when I noticed my hair looked and felt thicker. My hair wasn’t oily or weighed down. I’ve also seen significant growth to my hair. I’ve used at night only for the past 2 months. I highly recommend the serum however the shampoo and conditioner wasn’t for me. They left my hair feeling brittle and extremely dry. I use additional products to achieve hair greatness: Shampoo: Amika normcore, Amike Reset Gel or Oribe Alchemy Resilience | Conditioner Amika normcore or Oribe Alchemy Resilience | PM Nurtafol hair serum, Amike Wizard and Oribe Alchemy treatment serum | AM Olaplex hair oil, Amika Wizard l Wash, dry, straighten everyday.
Do not buy this! My hair was falling out at an alarming rate and only used this for a week. I have bare sports in my head where the serum was applied. It's not worth it.

If you haven’t tried this before, please do. My hair was falling out like crazy, I bought the little bottle to test it out and when I tell you that LI-TE-RA-LLY after 3 weeks my hair stopped thinning and noticed NEW BABY HAIRS!! So yes, please get this. My second purchase was the bigger bottle, can’t wait to try it and see more results!!!

title: Creates crazy new growth. Buy this!
body: This has created an incredible amount of new growth for me. I’ve had hair loss for a few different reasons and it’s a life saver. I won’t be without it going forward. Not sure about the issues with paint chipping. I haven’t had any of that and I also wouldn’t skip this for that reason.

title: A New Staple
body: was very skeptical about this product for years but finally decided to try it. Easy to use, seems to have improved hair quality and have noticed a slight improvement in hair density after about 7 weeks (in conjunction with other hair thinning treatments).

title: Actually works!
body: this serum has decreased me shedding so much im already seeing new hairs grow in

title: Favorite hair routine
body: My dermatologist suggested I use minoxidil in thinning areas near the temples. When I told her I'd prefer not to use that she suggested this. After using one bottle which took between a month and a month and a half I felt like *maybe* I was seeing results. In my follow up that took place after I finished the first bottle she showed me my before and after photos (they photograph and track my progress every visit) and I was blown away because its actually made a HUGE difference. I'm not really one to leave reviews but I was so pleasantly surprised with the results! If you're struggling with hair loss or thinning I would 100% recommend seeing a dermatologist because there are different reasons for hair loss/thinning so there are different solutions depending on what's going on with you.

I have tried many different products to help with hair growth and thickness and sadly none of them really worked. I can honestly say this works and I've only been using it for about 2 weeks. My hair feels thicker , looks healthier and I can see new growth. If you try this and feel that it makes your hair greasy then apply it at night before you go to sleep. I have been applying it this way and have had no issues. I will definitely repurchase this!
Love the ease of use. In about 2 weeks I noticed that my hair was thicker.

title: Works incredibly well
body: This 1000% works. I have tons of new growth. I pair it with taking inexpensive biotin and rahua leave in conditioner and the combo stopped me from losing hair and the serum helps grow new baby hair all over! Completely worth the price.

title: Did not work!
body: Do not waste your money on this product. Unlike many of the reviews that are here, I actually purchase this product hoping that it will help with my hair shedding/thinning. First of this product is very runny like water so you have to be careful how you apply to your scalp. After i finished the serum I did not see a difference.

title: Fragrance-free is not for me lol
body: Excellent product. I have seen great results. My hair is definitely fuller than a few months ago. Absolutely worth the price.

There’s a lot of great natural ingredients in the formula, so even tho I haven’t used it long enough to see results, I imagine it will do something. BUT, I really wish they would’ve added just enough natural fragrance to mask the smell of the formula. It’s a little stinky. And honestly, I will not continue to use a product that smells unpleasant. I’m giving it to my husband to see if it helps his receding hairline instead. He enjoyed his first treatment. lol It’s very watery but absorbs quickly. Nice glass bottle. I love this brand & everything else I’ve tried from them, but this one is a pass for me.

I have been using this product daily and I can say that my hair looks healthier and I see less breakage so I highly recommend this product from anyone suffering from hair breakage and I am hoping that it will help me out to grow my hair

I’ve been using this product for a little over two weeks. I can’t say that I’ve seen extreme growth. Applying it is relatively easy and doesn’t seem to make my hair too greasy, I’m hoping that with continually use I will see some great results.

title: Great product!
body: I really enjoyed this product I did see a difference in my hair, it's much thicker than before and I see what everyone is talking about with this product! It's amazing! I really hope I can try out more of this brand!

title: Ehhhh
body: I just started using it so I can’t say if it works or not but I can say that I’m confused on the reviews that say it doesn’t leave their hair greasy. My hair looks wet after it dries & feels gross.
I l love this serum it is apart of my daily routine and the new growth has been great. I will put it in my target areas then massage well into my scalp

I really like that this serum does not leave my hair looking or feeling oily. It is easy to apply, and it feels nice as I gently massage my scalp. I have noticed that have less hair falling out when I wash my hair since using this.

I have been using this serum for a few weeks now. It is lightweight, almost unscented. So far, i haven’t noticed any changes on my scalp or forehead since i’ve been focusing in that area. I do know it takes time to achieve those goals sobi guess i’ll just keep using it and update my review. I received this product complimentary from Nutrafol’s.

I received something for free in exchange for this post from NUTRAFOL WOMEN'S HAIR SERUM This is a fast-absorbing, lightweight, and restorative hair serum physician-formulated with patent-pending Ashwagandha Exosomes to naturally support visible thickness and hair strength. It improves hair thickness and strength. Visibly reduces hair breakage. I apply it on my scalp every night! It doesn't has any scent! Watery texture! Very easy to apply! I had used it for about two weeks, it does improve visible hair quality. Increase visibly thicker hair volume. Reduce visible breakage.

title: Love this serum!!
body: I've been testing this hair thickening/growth serum for about 3 weeks only. I have incredibly sensitive skin and other hair growth serums irritated me in the past. Thankfully Nutrafol's formula is not alcohol-based (although it does contain alcohol but further down in ingredient-list) - it triggered no allergies, caused no bumps, pimples or pain. I really appreciate that. I'm peri-menopausal and as such I noticed some unusual amount of hair-loss/thinning a few years back. Supplying the scalp with nutrients is a very important part of seeing new growth and this formula is infused with ashwaganda. It doesn't leave roots/scalp greasy, absorbed fast and contains no added fragrance. So far no baby hairs but I'll keep using it as directed. Got my fingers crossed.

title: Great Product!
body: This is my first time using this hair thickening serum. I applied it to my scalp with the dropper and gently massaged into the scalp. Cannot say I saw any major changes. Also, not a fan of the smell - since it's a leave in serum and I'm supposed to sleep in it - I didn't care for the sour scent. Overall, still excited to continue using i in hopes of some positive changes.

title: A HAIR GEM!!
body: Love this serum so much! Truly feels like its helping thicken and strengthen my hair and is a great alternative for those who don't enjoy taking daily supplements. This is definitely a preferred method for me and results have been great!

As I am getting older, I have noticed my hair is starting to thin out. Obviously that’s not ideal. I just decided to try this because I love this brand. It really does work and it just melts into your scalp super well. I am very happy they made this product!

After using this products for two weeks now I see such a big difference in the thickness of my hair! I’ve always had very thin and lifeless hair, but this helps SO much! It’s super easy to apply and it doesn’t weight my hair down at all and feels great. It doesn’t make my hair look dirty or too greasy at all so it’s good to use for any type of occasion!

I absolutely love this! I had horrible postpartum hair loss around my hair line and I can already see some growth just after a few weeks! Definitely worth a try if you need that little extra boost!!!!

title: A nice product!
body: I have been using this hair serum for a little over two weeks now, and while I do not yet notice a difference in my hair growth, I anticipate I will with continued use. I enjoy using the product as it makes me feel like I am taking good care of my hair. The serum applies easily and feels very refreshing and light on my scalp. It does not make my hair oily or affect the texture, which is a welcomed bonus as my hair does tend to get oily. The dropper makes it very easy to apply to problem areas where hair growth is more sparse. My only complaint is that the glass dropper tip broke upon my first time using it (not sure how) so I have to be very careful not to cut myself when using it as the glass at the tip is rough. Overall, it has been a nice addition to my hair care routine and I look forward to seeing the results on my hair.

title: It works!!
body: I never thought I’d need anything for thinning hair but stress got me picking at my hairline. I used this for ~2 weeks and I could see a difference! I saw more baby hairs in that area. One of the things that I was concerned about was if it’ll make my hair greasy since I don’t wash it everyday. It did not look greasy at all and didn’t feel heavy. I honestly kept forgetting that I even applied it. I’m going to try pairing it with a microderma roller next!!

title: Please read 🤓
body: This Nutrafol thickening hair serum is easy to use with the dropper applicator. I can tell a difference with how healthy my hair feels and looks. The only complaint I have is the packaging where the outer layer comes off the bottle.

title: Yes, you can filter out incentivized reviews
body: I've been using Nutrafol Women's Thickening-Hair Serum for a few weeks now. As someone with naturally thick hair, I didn't notice any significant change in the thickness or fullness of my hair. However, where this serum really shines is in its ability to repair damage. I started applying it specifically to my damaged ends and saw a noticeable improvement. The ends feel smoother and look healthier, which is a big win. The serum is lightweight, doesn't leave my hair feeling greasy, and has a pleasant scent. While I didn’t see the thickening effects it promises, I would definitely recommend it for anyone looking to improve the health and appearance of their hair ends.
You CAN filter reviews to include Non-Incentivized and Verified Purchases, everyone.

I like this hair oil it works really well and my hair felt softer and more healthier I definitely recommend it if you want your hair to grow fuller! If you feel like your hair is thinning out due to stress or bleach this is perfect for you! It’s a game changer it instantly improved the way my hair felt and it’s also very light weight now heavy at all.

title: Does not help grow hair!
body: I have been using this product for about 8 months and there has been NO change. So I showed it to my hairdresser and she said it’s just a scalp oil. Nothing is going to help you get thicker. If you read the description it says may give the appearance of thicker hair.

title: Need a filter for reviews
body: I’ve been using this daily for about two weeks now I have noticed that my hair feel more fuller. Combining it with their shampoo I do feel that I have less shedding. I’ve tried a lot of hair products and feel that for my scalp this one has worked the best. Hoping to have my hair restore back to pre- covid times.

title: Please change the packaging!
body: Can we add a filter button where you can only read reviews by those who weren’t “gifted” the product. I give you free products, you give me good reviews, I give you more free products. . . .I don’t even bother reading them if I see the word incentive

title: Terrible packaging
body: I love the product and I saw new hair growth and less breakage, but I unfortunately stopped using it because the packaging was such a pain! The paint was flaking all over my dresser, carpet, and my hair. I was applying this at night along with my skincare routine but the packaging was making my routine too time consuming because I had to be cleaning up all the tiny flakes. It just got annoying so I dreaded using it and eventually stopped :/ so please use a different packaging because I really loved what it was doing for a while.
Within days, the paint of the bottle had started chipping off. Now I can’t use the product bc even touching the bottle transfers the paint chips to my hands and winds up in my hair.

I saw minimal hair growth which is actually good because I have only used one bottle and you really notice significant hair growth 3 month into trying products. I’m going to bounce around with this and another hair growth serum! Deff recommend.

title: Great addition for New Hair Growth + Healthy Scalp
body: This is the best hair growth serum I have used so far. I tended to get oily scalp whenever I had used such serums before. This one was truly lightweight and I saw positive results from it. I have new hair growth, my hair shedding has gone down, and my scalp itchiness also dissipated. FYI, in addition to being consistent with this serum, I have also oiled my scalp and hair before shampooing, and have used leave-in conditioners regularly.

title: Great product, bottle sucks.
body: I normally don’t go for products super advertised and given out a lot with gifted commentary but I bought this and it has helped my hair grow.I had a lot of hair loss and my hair took years to even grow a little since using this product I’ve seen a huge improvement

title: Works
body: While I love this product and what it does for my hair, I HATE the bottle. All of the paint peels off and leaves white flakes in my hair and on the counter every time I use it.

title: Do not buy
body: Great product. Been using it for 3 weeks now. I have noticed less hair fall in my comb. Does not leave hair greasy. I am combining with the vitamins.
I’ve used this product over the last few weeks and it has actually increased my hair loss. Hair has fallen out of my head in the specific areas it was applied. Praying it grows back.
Absolutely 100% agree with the comment about NO MORE PAID REVIEWS. I'm so sick of reading unauthentic incentivized reviews of products .. because they do NOT give a true picture of the product.

title: Stop allowing paid reviews
body: Can we stop with incentivized ratings? This is ridiculous. 90% are people getting free products for 5 star reviews. Why even shop here if the reviews are sponsored? NO THANKS

title: A must have
body: This serum has helped my hair so much my hair looks and feels thicker and I’ve only been using it for 2 1/2 weeks. A combination of this serum once a day and good haircare has helped it grow.

title: Love this!
body: I’ve been using this product for about a week and I don’t know if it’s in my head but I’ve seen less breakage and around my hairline where I have seen some loss due to stress/hormones and it’s looking more full!

I absolutely love this brand and product😱 I definitely notice a difference in my hair and overall my health! I’m really pleased with the results and am seeing how much it helps, love it!!!! Gifted by nutrafol

Nutrafol gifted me their Women's Lightweight Thickening Hair Serum.This serum has improved the overall look of my thinning areas.I was shocked at how much less breakage I had after continued use for 90 days.The serum is formulated with a new technology called Ashwagandha Exosomes which is filled with protein, RNA, and lipids for healthy looking hair. I would definitely recommend this product for women with thinning hair.

I am 54 years old and I have noticed that my hair is thinning and my hairline has receded a little. After using this serum for just over a week, I noticed that my hair looks fuller and new hair is starting to grow along the hairline. This serum is very lightweight and not at all greasy. I can put it on before I leave the house and it doesn't look like I have anything there. I received this complimentary from Nutrafol for my honest review.

title: Expensive but lightweight and easy to use
body: Super happy and exited of the results Nutrafol thickening hair serum. I’ve noticed several baby hairs by my bangs and slowly my hair feels a bit fuller. The ingredients are amazing so I didn’t expect anything less. Gifted by Nutrafol

title: Great hair thickening serum!
body: This was gifted by Nutrafol for an honest review. I’ve been using for about two weeks, so I’m just starting to see a little bit of growth. I’ve read lots of positive reviews, so I’m excited to see how this helps with hair density and growth long-term. I like how easy it is to apply and how it doesn’t leave my hair greasy.

title: Hormonal / PP Hair Loss
body: This hair serum is amazing! I really appreciate that it doesn't leave my hair feeling oily, and the fact that it's made with natural and beneficial ingredients is a huge plus for me. I've even started to see some new hair growth around my face! I love pairing the serum with a scalp brush to give myself a little massage and help stimulate my scalp. I first spotted this serum at my the beauty salon I go to, and I was thrilled to finally give it a try. Gifted by nutrafol,but my love for it is genuine.

I love this!! Only been using it for about a week so I haven’t seen the results yet. But I love that it’s lightweight and doesn’t leave your hair greasy. I put it on at night and I can style like usual in the morning! Gifted by Nutrafol

This is truly a lightweight serum, it’s much like applying water to your scalp. I love that it doesn’t create heavy, greasy/oily residue. The only con is rubbing in something that is similar to water can be difficult lol. My hair is super thin, especially while pregnant and I’m expecting more loss as I approach post partum in a few weeks. I love that I can tell this product will help with adding thickness/fullness to my hair in those harder hair seasons. Gifted by Nutrafol

My hair has a tendency to fall out occasionally due to health problems. Because of this I always use some kind of topical growth treatment to help keep my hair full and growing. This is the second topical growth treatment I've tried and it works as well as the first. I haven't been using it long enough to notice a huge difference, but I really like that it's easy to use and doesn't leave my scalp looking oily. I am looking forward to using this more and to having thick, healthy hair.

title: The worst packaging possibly ever
body: I received this Women’s Lightweight Thickening-Hair Serum for Thinning Hair to try out and review complimentary from Nutrafol in exchange for my honest opinion. So far, I think that this hair serum seems good, and I’m looking forward to hopefully seeing good effects on my hair in the long term!

What I like about this product is it's really thin and lightweight. The dropper makes it easy to use and control, unlike spray products that get all over my face and break me out. The con is you have to use it consistently for a long time to see results and it was very hard for me to be consistent with it. Gifted by Nutrafol.

Nutrafol gifted me this Thickening-Hair Serum for Thinning Hair and it’s life changing for my hair! The serum is very lightweight, it feels like I'm applying water and it doesn’t make my hair feel oily or leave a residue at all! I visibly see my hair looking, feeling and is fuller and it’s only been a few weeks I've been using it. I’m so excited to continue using it to see further progress!

This was gifted by Nutrafol. I have not used it long enough to tell if there are actually any benefits. As for it being lightweight, I think that if you use it on damp hair and let it absorb and dry then it looks fine. Obviously with everyday use it will make your hair look oily.
I can’t with this packaging. It gets everywhere. Why for such an amazing and costly product do we have poor packaging? It literally disintegrates when you touch leaving a mess everywhere.

I received this product complimentary from Nutrafol. I have thin strands that are on the oilier side so I can only apply this at night before bed––it doesn't blend well can can make me look a little greasy if I use it during the day. It's too soon to say if this product has worked but I will continue to apply it to my hair.

title: AMAZING!

body: Nutrafol gifted me this lightweight Thickening-Hair Serum for Thinning Hair. This serum feels like I'm applying water, no heaviness or residue either! I can see new growth, in just the few weeks I've been using it and excited to see further progress

title: Great serum!
body: I’ve been using Nutrafol products for a few months now and I really like them! This serum definitely works, it just takes some time to see results! I’ve been applying a little to my problem areas everyday, and I’ve seen growth in those spots! It’s great that it doesn’t make your hair greasy either!

title: Lightweight and thickening
body: I'm surprised that this actually works, the little tiny baby hairs along my hair liner proof of it. No off-putting scent or greasy feel. I apply it to my hair fresh out of the shower and it even adds a little bit more texture once dry

title: A post-partum necessity
body: I was amazed by this hair serum. It’s quickly absorbed, and feels super lightweight. It is nourishing and works great for thin hair. Easy to apply, just Simply apply a few drops to scalp and massage.

title: Must have!
body: Loved this lightweight and thickening hair serum. My hair is pretty thin after giving birth couple of years ago, so I really wanted to try. I can tell my hair is getting stronger and also my scalp feels healthier. Love the fact that is also help with breakage!

I am so excited to see further results while using this serum. I have lost a lot of hair post-partum on either sides of the frame of my face. So far I have noticed that my hair appears slightly thicker with more volume. The serum itself is very thin in consistency and you don’t need to use a lot to cover a lot of space. It doesn’t have much of a scent. I apply it before bed where needed and when I wake up in the morning I don’t have any greasy hair. I’m going to continue to use every single day and I hope to see new growth with continued use.

Absolutely loving this product. I have been insecure about my hair loss and thinning for awhile now. Using this product daily has allowed me grow back my hair loss and feel confident again. I cannot recommend this product enough!!!!!

I have been using this for over a year, it is worth every penny. When I got COVID my hair was falling out. Now my hair is thicker, like it was when I was in my 20s. You have to use it for for 6 to 8 months before you see results. It’s must buy.
